description: Initial screen state: Setup page for a user testing session with instructions for screen sharing and a participant video feed.
frame_description: A dark grey screen with white text providing instructions for screen sharing.

description: Participant types the main task instructions: "Perfect! Here's your task: Now I'm going to show you a prototype with new filtering features... any confusion or friction you experience is valuable feedback!"
frame_description: The participant is typing a long paragraph of text into the central area of the screen.

description: Participant types additional instructions: "Please think aloud as you work through this... Let me know when you feel like you've completed the task."
frame_description: More text is being added to the instruction block on screen.

description: Participant types instructions for accessing the prototype: "I'm going to open the website in your browser now. If you don't see the website, click the button below to open it."
frame_description: The final lines of instruction are typed into the text area.

description: An 'Open' button appears on the screen below the typed instructions.
frame_description: A blue 'Open' button is now visible in the center of the screen.

description: Participant clicks the 'Open' button to launch the prototype.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button as it is clicked.

description: The screen transitions to a white loading state after the 'Open' button is clicked.
frame_description: The screen is entirely white during the transition.

description: The prototype loads the 'Explore' page, showing various tasks and surveys.
frame_description: The 'Explore' page of a mobile app is displayed, featuring cards for 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: User scrolls down the 'Explore' page to view more task listings.
frame_description: The list of tasks on the Explore page moves upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User scrolls down to reveal more task cards, including 'Diary Study'.
